tour.warehouseSelectorDesc: Choose the warehouse you want to manage. Each warehouse has its own independent stock.
tour.productsDesc: The main list of your goods with prices, stock levels, and availability statuses.
tour.suppliersDesc: Manage your list of suppliers and view the purchase history for each of them.
tour.historyDesc: View detailed logs of all receipts, dispatches, and transfers here.
tour.settingsDesc: Here you can change the warehouse name or delete it if it's no longer needed.
tour.categoriesDesc: Use the sidebar to quickly filter your products by their type.
tour.searchDesc: Find items by name, barcode, or any other parameter instantly.
tour.addProductDesc: Create new product entries manually by specifying prices and details.
tour.importDesc: Already have an Excel file? Upload your entire database in seconds.
tour.filterDesc: Filter products by status: for example, view only the items that are running low.
tour.selectAllDesc: Check this box to select all items on the current page for bulk actions.
tour.bulkDeleteDesc: This button appears only when multiple items are selected. It allows you to delete all selected at once.
tour.actionsDesc: Use this menu to edit product details or delete an item from the database.
tour.receiveDesc: Click here when you receive a new batch of items from a supplier.
tour.dispatchDesc: Use this to record sales or write off damaged goods.
tour.transferDesc: New! Easily move items from one of your warehouses to another in a few clicks.
